{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321220512E59EE72532EA2E12C9B9"}"},"total":1697},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7231543881833268008","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很新颖的题材，我之前也看过类似题材的书，所以被标题吸引，故事到现在还不错，严肃中带着一丝诙谐，希望作者大大继续更新，保持并尽力突破，给我们带来更棒的作品！加油！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1683725085,"group_id":"7198425533321841697","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/HeZHfYgBPvgrmcLxEE2jk=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/73815a2bb981475d8376e24cd0615d61~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622496&x-signature=K9Ur9YqZA%2FCxNKQgZEknA6ti8r8%3D","user_id":"606562438363391","user_name":"要曜仔贴贴"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"606562438363391","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7198425533321841697","book_info":{"abstract":"【赛博朋克+微克系+两界穿越+剧情向】
高考结束的关译心不幸穿越进了赛博朋克世界。
作为贫民区出身的5等公民，她的前方是应该挂路灯的垄断公司、背后是不做人的联邦政府、暗地里有疯狂搞事的邪教团伙、头顶挂着骂人比谁都遛还搞监视的AI。
为了生存，关译心只能：
【加入公司！在上班和上进之间，选择给公司上坟√】
【混入邪教！在作为和作用之间，选择给邪教作法√】
【进入学校！在添光和添彩之间，选择给学校添堵√】
这个世界里，到处都充斥着背叛、狡诈、剥削、黑暗
作为外来者的关译心始终心系地球，选择抄起家伙，拿出高考时的干劲，以007的姿态钻研《三年间谍，五年摆烂》，使劲煽风点火、搅风搅雨，平等地创死上述势力的所有人

关译心：“鉴于还要往赛博朋克世界穿越好几轮，希望这个世界可以早日习惯我，不要不识抬举。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o483f70cc4e8825b0d0aea6a10fb24011~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"王思入","author_id":"","book_id":"7198425533321841697","book_name":"穿进赛博，上学和上班我选上坟","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c83040","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5496人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7198905938890359354","read_count":"5496","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1854889"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"479","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,校园,幻想言情,穿越,赛博朋克","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/92bbbba4e5a8ef132f3a245cee89f43c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779285912&x-signature=7PheK%2FGgiqpewzZZUvAxFRMyCkM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2098337328149070","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7.697976e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321220512E59EE72532EA2E12C9B9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7697,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":26025},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7231211255574561597","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"关译心和陆离的相处真的好棒！双强的感觉，我已经很久没在言情看见这种描写了，作者加油！人设和描写都不错，剧情也超有意思！另外让我格外喜欢的就是赛博朋克世界的那个人工智能和那个警察（就是没记住名字），无论是反派还是配角啥的，写的都很到位，就是字数好少看不过瘾哈哈","text_exts":[{"e":74,"s":70,"text":"赛博朋克","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741019122E12C9B9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227231211255574561597%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227198425533321841697%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":83,"s":79,"text":"人工智能","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%BA%E5%B7%A5%E6%99%BA%E8%83%BD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741019122E12C9B9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227231211255574561597%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227198425533321841697%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%BA%E5%B7%A5%E6%99%BA%E8%83%BD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1683647784,"group_id":"7198425533321841697","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4a0+J8EdO9E6XPHRbeN11wlvkS8w+VuduSJ+dMZm3et","gender":2,"is_cancell t":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":27,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7867,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":12384},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7227410628239328032","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看的赛博朋克文，逻辑清晰，女主有勇有谋，果断，不过女主回到地球那段，个人感觉有点啰嗦，虽然插科打诨是缓解女主情绪，但是过多就有点和回来时作者营造的严肃紧张的氛围相撞，（我不知道我有没有会错意，个人觉得作者写女主回来想营造紧张刺激会错意的反转氛围以及国家派人极其关注的场景，来调动读者情绪，加重读者爽感，但是过度的描写，有一种那个劲儿始终上不来，不上不下的感觉。）作者描写的女主穿进赛博朋克里，一举一动冷静缜密，写的超级好，好看[大笑]","text_exts":[{"e":8,"s":4,"text":"赛博朋克","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741019122E12C9B9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227227410628239328032%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227198425533321841697%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1682762806,"group_id":"7198425533321841697","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我有好的多故事，可惜文笔不够！！！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxF4DJ+I3r5KVkGISKqXJ0F/5O8YxCGRdBoJlA6Uyc3E","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dd79250e0ae04e29b93568c8e399c742~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776624261&x-signature=yra1kWVcWA%2B4o%2FglqUrgdT0z1mM%3D","user_id":"3887529207022355","user_name":"也想吃哟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3887529207022355","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"
